title: Scaled Cognition Raises $100 Million to Address AI Hallucinations
description: AI lab Scaled Cognition has raised $100 million in new funding. The company’s Series A round, announced Thursday (June 9), values Scaled Cognition at $750 million and will help it expand its research team and speed product development. In an interview with the Wall Street Journal (WSJ) about the new funding, Scaled Cognition Co-Founder and CEO Dan Roth said the company [...] The post Scaled Cognition Raises $100 Million to Address AI Hallucinations appeared first on PYMNTS.com .

title: Three in four large enterprises have rolled back AI agents
description: A global survey found 74% of enterprises have rolled back a customer-facing AI agent after deployment The post Three in four large enterprises have rolled back AI agents appeared first on Digital Journal .

title: Employees use AI to make fake expense receipts, survey
description: Four in 10 US workers admit using AI to create bogus expense receipts, highlighting growing fraud and oversight risks for employers.

title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
description: BitcoinWorld Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents AI agents are evolving rapidly, moving from simple question-answering to autonomously executing complex, multi-step tasks like booking travel or analyzing financial data. But before these agents can be trusted in real-world applications, developers need rigorous assurance that they perform reliably across countless scenarios. Patronus AI, a San Francisco-based startup founded in 2023 by former Meta [...] This post Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents first appeared on BitcoinWorld .

title: Turkey vs USA prediction: I asked ChatGPT who’d win FIFA World Cup 2026 clash; AI picks winner in Group D match
description: Turkey’s creative flair and attacking talent under Vincenzo Montella will be tested against USA’s home strength, organisation and depth led by Mauricio Pochettino. I asked ChatGPT who’d win Turkey vs USA.
